sources.title: Bloodslinger | Full Western Action Horror | Free Hollywood Western Movie
sources.description:
In the tourist attraction town of Newcastle - we learn these same dusty 1900’s streets were once the killing grounds of the legendary Billy Bloodslinger, who’s vicious killing streak was finally brought to a violent end by its “righteous” citizens. The evil Billy was buried nearby along with his cursed gold coins forever… or so it would seem. On the final day of the show’s season, the cast members of the Billy Bloodslinger Show are visited by a mysterious stranger with secret intentions to raise Billy from the grave, which she does! The real Billy turns out to be a very different character, told in flashbacks as Billy is compelled to begin his forced slaughter in the search for his stolen gold.
2022.  Stars: Robert Miano, Reece Presley, Bart Rochon
